items.name_en: Monogram
items.name_cn:
Monogram
New small size Praphy shoulder bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FEND1] decorated at the bottom. The bag's silhouette follows the body's lines perfectly, exuding a full sense of fashion when carried on the shoulder.
Small: 20x7.5x13cm
Style: 8024/1

items.name_en: Monogram
items.name_cn:
Monogram
Latest Monogram Boston 365 Boston bag is here!
In this season's collaboration with Milan designer Stefano Pilati, my favorite bag is this one. Fully enclosed magnetic opening, practical and private, suitable for daily commuting, travel, sports, and all occasions.
I have to say this bag is really spacious, with super strong practicality!
Model: Pillow bag Monogram

specs.rawTitle:
Monogram
Latest Monogram Boston 365 Boston bag is here!
In this season's collaboration with Milan designer Stefano Pilati, my favorite bag is this one. Fully enclosed magnetic opening, practical and private, suitable for daily commuting, travel, sports, and all occasions.
I have to say this bag is really spacious, with super strong practicality!
Model: Pillow bag Monogram

items.name_en: Monogram vintage backpack is here! I really love the combination of metal buckle elements and the monogram. Practical, retro, and beautiful all in one, the capacity really surprised me, it can satisfy short business trips. You really can't find this feeling in current backpacks, vintage styles are truly the best.

items.name_en: Name: Baguette Clutch
items.name_cn:
Name: Baguette Clutch
Model: 8889 Monogram
Quality: Top-tier Original Single
Color: Monogram Beige Fabric
Size: 20×13×3cm
Baguette Clutch, with a detachable fine chain, for hand or underarm carry. Zipper closure with a zipper pull featuring the iconic FF pattern. Fabric material with brown and tobacco yellow jacquard FF. Gold-tone hardware.

items.name_en: Name: FENDI (Fendi) Kan I
items.name_cn:
Name: FENDI (Fendi) Kan I
Quality: Original Order Quality
Model: Small 8840
Color: Mocha
Size: 19×13×9
Upgraded FENDI Kan I with arched bridge and new lock. Retains internal pocket and two compartments separated by cardboard. Equipped with detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or handheld use. Large FF pattern contrasts with black, made of cowhide. Opens with a push-lock. Stylish and practical.
